Partner with KuboVista

Join the KuboVista Marketplace

List your homestay, offer guided tours, or provide taxi services to thousands of travelers

List Your Homestay

  • Reach 10,000+ travelers
  • Verified bookings
  • Instant payments
  • Guest reviews

Become a Local Guide

  • Set your own schedule
  • Earn per tour
  • Build your reputation
  • Meet travelers worldwide

Offer Transport Services

  • Steady bookings
  • GPS tracking
  • Transparent pricing
  • Cashless payments

Why KuboVista?

Built for local providers who want to grow without the hassle.

Zero commission for first 3 months

Keep 100% of your earnings while you grow

Verified traveler profiles

Every guest is identity-verified for safety

Instant payout system

Get paid directly to your bank within 24 hours

24/7 support

Dedicated provider helpline anytime you need

How It Works

Four simple steps to start earning with KuboVista.

Step 01

Register your business

Fill out a simple application with your details and documents.

Step 02

Complete verification

We verify your identity and property within 48 hours.

Step 03

Start receiving bookings

Go live and start accepting bookings from travelers.

Step 04

Grow your business

Build reviews, earn more, and scale with KuboVista.

Provider FAQs

Common questions from our provider community.

Anyone who owns a homestay, has a licensed vehicle for transport, or is a certified local guide can apply. We welcome individuals and small businesses across all 17 Himalayan destinations.

Ready to grow?

Join 500+ local providers on KuboVista and turn your passion into income.
